input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 65 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 11, "message": "11 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 7, "message": "7 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 13, "message": "13 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 7, "message": "7 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 9, "message": "9 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 7, "message": "7 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 5, "message": "5 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "general", "count": 6, "message": "6 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": null, "current_utilization": 108, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "St. Michael's Hospital", "facility_id": "st-michaels", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to St. Michael's Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Charge Nurse, prepare for significant incoming clusters, notably 11 respiratory, 13 GI, 7 cardiac, 7 neuro, 7 injury, and 5 mental health patients, activating respective protocols immediately. Although current utilization is 108%, capacity is stable for the next two hours. To mitigate this high load, divert CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, St. Michael's, or SickKids, which are currently at 0% utilization.
